examples: Mrs. Tara thought for sure that she knew who Peyton would pick.
One six-year-old girl named Peyton surprised everyone by making an unexpected decision.
Mr. Tara was surprised by Peyton when she picked a little boy who never got picked by anyone for anything.
The family of Peyton Strickland have asked for an investigation into the court errors.
And unlike in January, Peyton Manning wasn't booed when he took a knee this time.
